title: What's in Store for Boston Scientific's (BSX) Q4 Earnings?
text: On a geographic basis, every Boston Scientific (BSX) market in fourth-quarter 2021 is expected to have registered broad-based growth compared with the dull fourth-quarter 2020 numbers.

title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Hit by Procedure Deferrals Amid COVID
text: Although Boston Scientific (BSX) reports margin expansion on a year-over-year basis, the decline in R&D expenses is concerning.

title: Should You Buy Boston Scientific Stock Over Its Industry Peer?
text: We think that Boston Scientific stock currently is a better pick compared to its industry peer, Medtronic stock, despite it being the more expensive of the two, trading at 5.3x trailing revenues compared to 4.4x for Medtronic. title: Boston Scientific to Present New Data on Advances in Chronic Pain Care at the 2022 North American Neuromodulation Society (NANS) Meeting
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass. , Jan. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced key data that will be featured at the 25th North American Neuromodulation Society (NANS) annual meeting, in Orlando, Florida, on Jan.13-15, 2022.
